title: Which Of The Following May Be A Hipaa Violation
source_filename: Which Of The Following May Be A Hipaa Violation.docx

qas.q: HIPAA

Which of the following would be considered a HIPAA violation?

I. Accessing your own medical records without authorization
II. Posting images on Facebook even if identification is removed
III. Releasing images to someone without written permission
HIPAA laws are enforced by
qas.a: Unites States Department Health Services-Office of civil rights

qas.q: The number of ethics investigations by the ARRT regarding HIPAA have ________since 2010.
In order to be HIPAA compliant, PACS (Picture Archive Communication Systems) systems must be able to provide a/an _________to show who has downloaded images and how they were shared.
When transferring images electronically, it is important to make sure that the Three Rights are followed. They are the Right: (Select all that apply)
One of the most common HIPAA violations occurs because technologists and doctors fail to
qas.a: Logout of computer after each use

qas.q: Which of the following are acceptable social media apps for the distribution of protected health care information?
qas.a: none= facebook, IG, Snapchat, or linked-in

qas.q: The ASRT Standard of Ethics contains both the Code of Ethics and the Rules of Ethics. When a technologist is suspected of violating HIPAA rules, the __________of Ethics will be enforced and if violated, the technologist could be sanctioned.
You see a friend at your observation site. The friend has not told anyone that she is ill and she does not acknowledge seeing you. What should you do?
qas.a: Respect her privacy by not talking to her unless she voluntarily talks to you and gives you information about her condition

qas.q: Disciplinary action may be initiated if a student commits which serious infraction?
qas.a: disclosure of confidential records, falsification of records, cheating, intoxication

qas.q: If a radiography student is to perform radiologic procedures competently, he or she must always
qas.a: develop and refine the appropriate skills and behaviors.

qas.q: Which program official is responsible for the overall organization, administration, and assessment of the radiography program?
An instructor may use which format to measure cognitive behaviors?
Which program official often provides one-on-one instruction and evaluation of students in the clinical setting?
Clinical procedures and activities are performed in what setting?
A qualified practitioner directly supervises a student radiographer by
A student's unsatisfactory radiographs must be repeated in the presence of a qualified practitioner because
qas.a: quality patient care and protection from radiation must be ensured and provided

qas.q: Cognitive learning includes
Affective behaviors influence a person's ability to
qas.a:
One of the three major categories or domains of learning; includes:
-behaviors
-guided by feelings and emotions
-that are influenced
by an individual's interests, attitudes, values, and beliefs.
